title: Cost of Publication
doc_html:
§147.3. Cost of publication

            The official journal of a political subdivision shall include a statement of the cost charged to the political subdivision for publication with any proceeding, notice, or other information that it publishes for the political subdivision pursuant to a legal requirement that the information be published. The official journal shall not charge the political subdivision for printing this statement of cost.

            Acts 2024, No. 464, §1.
doc_text:
§147.3.  Cost of publication
The official journal of a political subdivision shall include a statement of the cost
charged to the political subdivision for publication with any proceeding, notice, or other
information that it publishes for the political subdivision pursuant to a legal requirement that
the information be published.  The official journal shall not charge the political subdivision
for printing this statement of cost.
Acts 2024, No. 464, §1.
